caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, over-ear headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the white text "I NEVER DO SHIT" speaks into a large grey microphone. He is positioned in a room that appears to be a studio or clothing shop, with various framed photos on the wall behind him, a white mannequin wearing a white shirt, and racks of clothing in the background. To the left and right of the man, small logos are visible on the screen; one is a circular black and white logo and the other is red text that reads "REALLY TOT". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, talking and slightly shifting his facial expressions and head posture as he speaks. The background and camera angle remain static across the frames.
